plugins.name: zig-claude-kit
plugins.description: Corrective context for Zig 0.15.x that fixes Claude's outdated training data. Covers I/O (Writergate), build.zig, format strings, ArrayList, BoundedArray, and usingnamespace.

plugins.name: tdd-pipeline
plugins.description: Language-agnostic TDD pipeline with test-first agents, review loops, and verify gates.

plugins.name: cross-review
plugins.description: Multi-model code review with cross-validation. Orchestrates Claude and GPT-5.4 reviews, validates findings against each other, outputs merged fix list.

plugins.name: knowledge-forge
plugins.description: Cross-session routing and capture for a three-layer personal knowledge base. Auto-discovered skill teaches index-first retrieval. /kb-capture files notes into the right wiki bucket. /kb-ingest downloads external doc packs from any session.
